title: I just found something really strange in the OP
display_title: I just found something really strange in the OP
wikitext:
[]: I just found something really strange in the OP.             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Wed Mar 18, 2009 10:36 pm It would appear that there is a frame of what appears to be (I shit you not) Kaworu's face in the OP. In the creditless OP, it's at about 1:09. In the episodes proper, it's at about 1:02. You'll have to freeze-frame to see it properly; fortunately, I have a screencap handy. Woo for Media Player Classic.

[]:             Quote Post by LeoXiao » Wed Mar 18, 2009 10:54 pm .... So? Why is that strange?

[]:             Quote Post by rberlin » Wed Mar 18, 2009 10:57 pm Kaworu's not the cruel angel, he's the love angel.

[]:             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Wed Mar 18, 2009 11:01 pm LeoXiao wrote: .... So? Why is that strange?

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Wed Mar 18, 2009 11:05 pm They totally planned the Kaworu stuff well in advance. A version of him is in the proposal, and that particular version actually fits the theme song about cruel angels. So it's entirely possible that they were making up stuff as they went, especially with the budget cuts and network issues.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Wed Mar 18, 2009 11:05 pm no, anno just wanted to bring kaworu in much earlier. with all the cuts and whatever he had to change a lot of things. thats why he shows up in rebuild

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Mar 19, 2009 12:06 am Having Kaworu show up earlier is definately an improvement in rebuild... and one thing I believe the manga changed for the better (though with how he is actually portrayed... not as much)

[]: Re: I just found something really strange in the OP.             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Mar 19, 2009 2:10 am SeanTucker wrote: It would appear that there is a frame of what appears to be (I shit you not) Kaworu's face in the OP.

[]: Re: I just found something really strange in the OP.             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Mar 19, 2009 2:18 am Reichu wrote: SeanTucker wrote: It would appear that there is a frame of what appears to be (I shit you not) Kaworu's face in the OP.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Mar 19, 2009 8:22 am Kaworu is also in the original story outline, much earlier, and in a way vaguely similar to how he was introduced in the manga. This is not strange.

[]: Re: I just found something really strange in the OP.             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Thu Mar 19, 2009 11:48 am SeanTucker wrote: It would appear that there is a frame of what appears to be (I shit you not) Kaworu's face in the OP.

[]:             Quote Post by rberlin » Thu Mar 19, 2009 12:25 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Kaworu is also in the original story outline, much earlier, and in a way vaguely similar to how he was introduced in the manga. This is not strange.

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Thu Mar 19, 2009 8:04 pm Right, a cat controling a boy if I'm not mistaken. http://i528.photobucket.com/albums/dd325/Synapsidia/EVA/Kaworu_prototype1.png

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Thu Mar 19, 2009 9:33 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Kaworu is also in the original story outline , much earlier, and in a way vaguely similar to how he was introduced in the manga.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Mar 19, 2009 10:01 pm Oedipusfoot wrote: What (where)?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Mar 19, 2009 11:13 pm I find it pretty interesting that he had a core in one of those drawings. Also, you left out the transitional production drawing where he was in nekomimi mode.

[]:             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Thu Mar 19, 2009 11:21 pm Well, excuse me for not knowing then. I noticed a red flash, freeze-framed it, shat bricks, and decided to post it here, which apparently was a bad idea since apparently everyone already knows about this and I'm an idiot for not having read the entire wiki.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Mar 20, 2009 1:38 am SeanTucker wrote: Well, excuse me for not knowing then. I noticed a red flash, freeze-framed it, shat bricks, and decided to post it here, which apparently was a bad idea since apparently everyone already knows about this and I'm an idiot for not having read the entire wiki.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Mar 20, 2009 1:41 am NAveryW wrote: Also, you left out the transitional production drawing where he was in nekomimi mode.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Mar 20, 2009 2:32 am @Synapsid So that's why we only see such coy nakedness in the ep24 shower scene... NAveryW wrote: just remember that people have been scrutinizing every frame of this show for well over a decade. It is incredibly, incredibly unlikely that you will ever find a hidden image that hasn't been found yet.
